title: Totem Of Cookie
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/156dcec886e26cb6694158bc769596c38d5b3fec.jpeg)
### About

Replaces totem of undying texture to custom made cookie texture.

### Updates

I will update this resourcepack to lastest versions of minecraft.
